phases.title: Persist within-column order in kanbanStore + apply during column derivation
verification: `kanbanStore.ts` adds `orderByColumnByProject: Record<string, Record<string, number[]>>` to state with `{}` initial; persist version bumped from 2 to 3 with a migrate clause that adds an empty map.

`applyColumnOrder<T extends { number: number }>(issues, order)` exported as a pure helper: present-in-order first, missing appended in API order, returns input unchanged when `order` is empty/undefined.
`KanbanBoard.tsx` applies `applyColumnOrder` to each column's issues array (including the completed column); memo deps include the per-project order selector.
`pnpm build` clean; `pnpm test` count unchanged from prior phase (98).
phases.summary: Added orderByColumnByProject state + 3 actions (setColumnOrder/clearColumnOrder/clearAllColumnOrders) to kanbanStore with persist v2→v3 migrate; exported pure applyColumnOrder helper. Wired into KanbanBoard column derivation memo for both regular and completed columns. Build clean, test count unchanged at 98.

phases.title: Refactor cards to useSortable + SortableContext per column + within-column drag-end + reset menu + tests
verification: `KanbanColumn.tsx` wraps the card list in `<SortableContext items={issues.map(i => i.number)} strategy={verticalListSortingStrategy}>`.
`KanbanCard.tsx` uses `useSortable({ id: issue.number })` and applies its `transform`/`transition`/`isDragging` to the outer wrapper; existing card JSX preserved.
`KanbanBoard.tsx` `handleDragEnd` branches on `sourceColumn === targetColumn`: within-column case uses `arrayMove` + `setColumnOrder`; cross-column case retains existing transition logic.
Drop on an empty column area (string `over.id`) and drop over a sibling card (number `over.id`) are both handled.
Per-column reset button appears in the column header only when `orderByColumnByProject[projectId][columnId].length > 0`; click calls `clearColumnOrder(columnId)` and stops event propagation.
`kanban.css` adds `.kanban-column-reset` styles consistent with existing column-header styling.
`apps/desktop/src/stores/__tests__/kanbanOrder.test.ts` adds 3 vitest cases (empty/undefined order, partial order with missing items, empty issues + phantom numbers).
`pnpm build` clean; `pnpm test` desktop count goes from 98 to 101 (+3).
Manual smoke: within-column drag reorders, persist survives view switches, reset returns to API order, cross-column transitions unchanged.
phases.summary: Converted KanbanCard from useDraggable to useSortable with transform/transition style; KanbanColumn wraps card list in SortableContext + verticalListSortingStrategy and shows a reset arrow when a custom order is active. KanbanBoard handleDragEnd branches on within-column (arrayMove + setColumnOrder) vs cross-column (existing transitions); handles both string and number over.id. Added 3 vitest cases for applyColumnOrder. Build clean, test count 98 → 101.
